summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a solid, good‑spirited show with decent playing and a notable blues encore.
review: The recording is praised for its excellent sound‑board quality, delivering clear audio that lets the band’s upbeat vibe shine through. While the performance is generally in good spirits, a few reviewers note occasional sloppy moments (“crazy fingers jam”), but the overall energy and a memorable blues‑style encore keep the show enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong recording quality (high praise, likely soundboard) balanced against mixed comments on performance; overall rating lands in the good‑to‑great range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the audio "excellent quality" and note a crisp sound‑board source; no major dropouts or distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The band was in good spirits with a generally solid flow; some minor playing slips are mentioned but they don’t disrupt the overall enjoyment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned as "cool" and interacting with the crowd; one note of sloppy finger work.
band_member_comments.Phil: Noted for enjoying the attention and being part of on‑stage jokes.
band_member_comments.Drums: Reference to an electronic drum space in the early set, but no specific performance critique.
